description: Tax credit of up to $2,000 per qualifying child under 17. Up to $1,700 is refundable (Additional Child Tax Credit).

eligibility.notes: Credit phases out by $50 for each $1,000 of income over the threshold. Amounts are post-TCJA and subject to legislative changes.

apply_in_person: Claim on your federal tax return. Free filing at NYC Free Tax Prep sites.
how_to_apply: Claim the credit when filing your federal tax return.
